{{Infobox character
| name = Remnant of the Sword Sage
| aliases = Sword Sage's Remnant
| species = Remnant
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Remnant of the Sword Sage]] is a mass of rippling [[liquid steel]] in human shape with a featureless, polished face.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Remnant of the Sword Sage]] has three spinning hoops on its chest: white, scarlet, and inky black.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Remnant of the Sword Sage]] can sprout six limbs of liquid metal from its back.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] suspects the [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] may contribute to her heightened awareness.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
